title: Chapter 33 Sub-Chapter 4.2 Tuition and Fees
description: The Post-9/11 GI Bill (Chapter 33) offers benefits for service members, veterans, and dependents attending approved education and training programs taken at colleges or universities. Effective October 1, 2011, benefits can also be paid for additional non-college degree (NCD) programs.
keywords: Tuitions and fees, NCDs, Non-College Degree programs, Slight Training, Correspondence courses, Licensing and Certification reimbursement, National Tests, Tuition and fee payments,
